title: Software Update - DFU - Animations on Software Update screen
scenario: Software Update screen animations during DFU verify correct slide transitions and animated update indicator on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Tap the Update button — the Software Update screen should slide in from the right.
5. Tap Continue — the Three Easy Steps screen should slide in from the right.
6. Tap the back arrow — the Software Update screen should slide in from the left.
7. On the Three Easy Steps screen, tap Start Update — the Updating screen should slide in from the right with an animated picture in the center.
expected: All screen transitions use smooth slide animations: Software Update slides in from the right when Update is tapped; Three Easy Steps slides in from the right when Continue is tapped; Software Update slides in from the left when the back arrow is tapped; Updating screen slides in from the right with an animated picture in the center when Start Update is tapped.
